title: Morrisiella morriaii
taxonomy: Morrisiella morriaii is a genus and species of plant within the family Burseraceae. It belongs to the kingdom Plantae, and further classified into the phylum Magnoliophyta and class Magnoliopsida. The order is Sapindales, and the family is Burseraceae, with the genus being Morrisiella. The species morriaii is a part of the genus.
